message:
test(ext): add event dispatch wiring tests for tool/command/event paths (bd-1u6)

18 integration tests covering:
- dispatch_event fire-and-forget with matching/missing hooks
- dispatch_event_with_response returning handler values
- dispatch_cancellable_event detecting false return as cancellation
- dispatch_tool_call blocking/non-blocking/no-hook paths
- dispatch_tool_result invocation verification
- Event hook filtering (only matching hooks invoked)
- Event lifecycle ordering (startup → agent_start → tool_call → tool_result → agent_end)
- Extension tool registration and execution via JS runtime
- Manager behavior without JS runtime (graceful degradation)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
